title: RaveDAO Explodes 58% to Reach $26.71 as Top-20 Cryptocurrency Gains Massive Momentum
excerpt: RaveDAO (RAVE) has surged an impressive 58.28% in the past 24 hours, climbing to $26.71 and securing its position as the 19th largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization. The dramatic price movement has caught the attention of traders and investors as the DAO token continues its remarkable upward trajectory.
